name: Grant Morton
abilities: ★ The Long Takeaway — his backswing is so slow that leaves hang in the air and the tide holds its breath; opponents have aged on the tee waiting for the ball to leave. At the top, all goes still — and the strike is pure.

Patience Rewarded. Net runner-up in '22 and '23, Pairs Champion with Joe, and a closest-to-pin ace — undone only by the odd snowman (dead last, '24). His resounding positivity, they say, is inspirational.
flavor: “There's no rush. The ball will still be there.”
caption: Grant Morton · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
